purpose: Create, record, stream, compact, persist, and optionally export all session events — maintaining full audit trail while managing context window limits and enabling remote steering

activities.name: Create Session State Container
activities.description: Allocate session ID, initialize workspace directory structure (checkpoints/, plan.md, files/) under ~/.copilot/session-state/<id>/

activities.name: Record Events to Session Log
activities.description: Append each event (100+ types including assistant.message, tool.call, user.message, session.compacted, etc.) to session JSONL log at ~/.copilot/session-state/<id>/events.jsonl

activities.name: Stream Events to SDK Client
activities.description: Forward events via JSON-RPC notifications (assistant.*, session.*, tool.*, subagent.*, error.*, etc.) to connected SDK client in real-time

activities.name: Manage Context Window
activities.description: Track token utilization against model context limit; trigger background compaction at 80% threshold; trigger blocking compaction at 95% threshold; summarize older turns

activities.name: Persist and Resume Sessions
activities.description: Save checkpoints with full conversation state; support resume via client.resumeSession(id); fork sessions via sessions.fork preserving history

activities.name: Export to Remote (Mission Control)
activities.description: When session.remote.enable() called, stream events to GitHub Mission Control service for web/mobile steering and collaborative observation

arrows.label: Session events (all types: assistant, tool, user, system)
JSON-RPC event stream to SDK client
Accumulated token count from recorded events
Remote event stream to GitHub Mission Control
